jsonLd.title: SEBI is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!
